header.tagline: AI that helps users fill PDF forms step by step

infoModal.title: AI-assisted form filling, humans in the loop
infoModal.disclaimer: This demo is anonymous and rate-limited; tool execution stays client-side, the server is a streaming proxy only.
infoModal.piiWarning: data you type or dictate to the assistant is sent to the LLM provider (Anthropic for this demo). Do not share real personal information (SSN, BSN, DOB, medical data, etc.).
infoModal.whyItMattersBody: AI is undeniably great at automating tasks, including filling forms. But the trust is not there yet.
infoModal.humanInTheLoopTitle: SimplePDF fills forms with AI while the user stays in control
infoModal.humanInTheLoopBullet1: The human sees fields getting filled in real time, in the editor.
infoModal.humanInTheLoopBullet2: The AI can hand off to the user for fields it should not auto-fill (for example signatures).
infoModal.aboutIntro: Three architectural guarantees that make Form Copilot safe to run on real forms:
infoModal.aboutBullet1Title: Document processing stays in the browser.
infoModal.aboutBullet1Body: PDFs are edited locally on your device. The document content itself is never uploaded to SimplePDF's servers.
infoModal.aboutBullet2Body: In this demo the chat is powered by Claude (Anthropic) using our key. Self-host Form Copilot with your own API key and chat traffic goes straight from your server to your chosen provider — SimplePDF stays out of the loop.
infoModal.aboutBullet3Title: Bring your own storage for submissions.
infoModal.aboutBullet3Body: On Pro and Premium plans, completed forms flow directly into your own S3-compatible storage, Azure Blob Storage, or SharePoint. PII lives in your infrastructure, not ours.
infoModal.useCasesFooter: Click on any of the use cases above to switch forms.

healthcare.title: Healthcare
healthcare.body: Patient intake and claims (e.g. CMS-1500) are PHI-heavy. The copilot walks users through the form while the document stays in the browser, and submissions route straight to the provider's own storage and LLM provider.

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.body: ACORD applications, claim forms and policy endorsements. Carriers and brokers cut customer friction by letting the copilot pre-fill known data, explain coverages and route the finished PDF to the underwriter's system.

state.title: State bureaucracy
state.body: Scanned government forms become instantly fillable thanks to SimplePDF's field detection. Particularly useful when the form is in a language the user does not speak — the copilot translates, explains, and fills step by step.

hr.title: HR onboarding
hr.body: NDAs, offer letters, W-9, I-9. The copilot prefills what it can from context, hands off to the human for signatures, and submits into the HR workflow.

chat.heading: Chat
chat.subtitleWaiting: Waiting for the editor to load…
chat.errorFriendlyGeneric: I wasn't able to complete that. Could you rephrase what you'd like me to do?
chat.errorFriendlyWithAction: I wasn't able to {{action}}. Could you rephrase what you'd like me to do?

debugPanel.title: Debug panel
debugPanel.emptyLog: No calls yet. Click a button above.

errors.noField: Run getFields first to pin a field
